title.ko: 수증기 또는 증기응축기(증기의 응축 B01D 5/00; 분산된 분자의 정전기적 침전에 앞서 가스의 예비처리를 하는 동안의 응축 B03/C 3/014 : 응축기를 가진 증기기관 플랜트 F01K; 기체의 액화 F25J; 열교환 또는 열전달 장치의 세부 일반 F28F)
title.en: STEAM OR VAPOUR CONDENSERS (condensation of vapours B01D0005000000;condensation during pretreatment of gases prior to electrostatic precipitation of dispersed particles B03C0003014000;steam engine plants having condensers F01K;liquefaction of gases F25J;details of heat-exchange or heat-transfer arrangements of general application F28F)
Condensers in which the steam or vapour is separated from the cooling medium by walls, e.g. surface condenser
using water or other liquid as the cooling medium
employing moving walls
using air or other gas as the cooling medium
employing moving walls

title.ko: 수증기 또는 증기가 냉각매체와 직접접촉을 하는 응축기
title.en: Condensers in which the steam or vapour comes into direct contact with the cooling medium
by providing a flowing coating of cooling liquid on the condensing surface

title.ko: 수증기 또는 증기중에 냉각액체를 분사하는 것(3/08 이 우선)
title.en: by injecting cooling liquid into the steam or vapour (F28B0003080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 냉각액체중에 수증기 또는 증기를 분사하는 것(3/08이 우선)
title.en: by injecting the steam or vapour into the cooling liquid (F28B0003080000 takes precedence)
with rotatable members

title.ko: 그룹 F28B 1/00과 F28B 3/00에 포함되는 방법의 조합에 의한 응축기 기타의 응축기
title.en: Condensers employing a combination of the methods covered by groups F28B0001000000 and F28B0003000000; Other condensers
Combinations of two or more condensers, e.g. provision of reserve condenser
Auxiliary systems, arrangements, or devices
for feeding steam or vapour to condensers
for feeding, collecting, and storing cooling water or other cooling liquid
with provision for re-cooling the cooling water or other cooling liquid
for collecting and removing condensate
for extracting, cooling, and removing non-condensable gases
Controlling arrangements with features specially adapted for condensers
